license.name: Government of India Open Data License

indicator.title: State per-capita Net State Domestic Product (current prices)
indicator.description: Net State Domestic Product (NSDP) per person, in current prices. Sourced from NITI Aayog ICED dashboard (state-wise deep-dive), originally compiled by MoSPI from State DES estimates. Per-capita NSDP is the standard income comparator across states; constant-price series strips out inflation for real growth comparisons.

denominator.note: Per-capita = NSDP ÷ state mid-year population estimate

indicator.methodology_vintage: MoSPI / State DES; NSDP per-capita series
